eip_8037_state_gas.highlight: Multiple gas dimensions creating complexity: blob/regular, pre/post-state validation, state/regular, user/block accounting
Regular gas must be charged before state gas to prevent reservoir refill consensus issues
Execution spec tests changing frequently; next release should stabilize for DevNet 3
Most clients passing tests; ~4 test failures expected in next release due to bug fixes

testing_progress.highlight: Kurtosis EVM fuzzing reveals edge cases; gas discrepancy tracing difficult across clients
Precompile tests updated to avoid caching; inputs now vary for realistic benchmarks

repricing_updates.highlight: BOLT-optimized benchmarks starting this week for compute reprice (7904) final numbers
State access benchmarking (8038) in third iteration; numbers expected by next breakout call
Gas repricing target: final numbers during April, DevNet integration by interop

action_items.action: Review Tony's block-level access list gas validation phases proposal
Add spec clarification: regular gas charged before state gas to prevent OOG edge cases
Create tests for regular-before-state gas charging order

decisions.decision: When opcode requires both gas types, regular gas charge applied first; state gas skipped if OOG
Next execution spec test release will be baseline for DevNet 3; further changes deferred to DevNet 4

targets.target: This week - Final execution spec test release for EIP-8037 DevNet 3 baseline
This week - BOLT-optimized benchmark data collection begins for EIP-7904
April 2026 - Gas repricing EIPs (7904, 8038) integrated into DevNet 4 or 5
